expectations.text: SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with both name and description fields
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter has 'name: change-summary' and description field between '---' delimiters on lines 1 and 4.

expectations.text: The name field uses lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only (max 64 chars)
expectations.evidence: name: change-summary (15 chars, lowercase + hyphen only).

expectations.text: Description uses intent-forward phrasing (e.g., '用户想...时' / '当 X 发生时'), not capability-style ('Helps with...' / 'Assists...')
expectations.evidence: Description begins '每次写完或改完代码、即将结束一轮编辑工作时触发' — a clear 'when X' trigger phrasing, not 'Helps with'.

expectations.text: Description includes concrete user trigger phrases (real wording a user would say), not just an abstract capability statement
expectations.evidence: Description describes a situational trigger ('回合结尾'/'end of any turn that modified source code') but does not quote any concrete user phrases like '总结一下' or '刚才改了啥'.

expectations.text: Description clarifies when NOT to trigger or scopes the skill narrowly enough to avoid constant misfiring
expectations.evidence: Description scopes firmly to turns containing 'Edit/Write/MultiEdit/NotebookEdit 等代码修改动作'; SKILL.md body also lists three explicit non-trigger cases.

expectations.text: Process notes or SKILL.md explicitly address whether this skill has side effects and whether disable-model-invocation is appropriate
expectations.evidence: process-notes.md discusses Stop hook vs skill triggering but never explicitly names side effects or the disable-model-invocation decision.

expectations.text: SKILL.md body content is primarily in Chinese (matches user's request for 中文小结)
expectations.evidence: All section headings and prose are Chinese ('何时触发', '产出格式', '怎么收集信息', '写作准则', '反例', '和 git 的关系').

expectations.text: SKILL.md body specifies what Claude should actually do (read X, output Y in format Z), not just abstract goals
expectations.evidence: Body includes a fixed output code-block template with three sections ('改动文件'/'功能变化'/'Breaking change') and an ordered 4-step info-collection procedure including 'git status' and 'git diff --stat'.
